provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the National Planning Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the National Planning Commission Advisory Council established under section 6
the National Planning Commission established under section 3
the Commissioner General appointed under section 16
a plan implemented in a period of more than five years but is not a national vision

a framework that outlines the broad economic situation that must be taken into account when developing the national development plan, including the broad policy environment and strategy for the plan, describing the country’s development prospects in terms of gross domestic product (GDP) growth
a plan implemented in a period of two to five years
a member of the National Planning Commission Advisory Council appointed under section 6
a national development plan developed and implemented under section 21
a framework that defines a national development agenda over an extended period, as may be specified in that framework
the national development planning period in section 21
a plan implemented in a period of up to 12 months.
